title: Walking the Dog
scene: 你在公园里遛狗，遇到了邻居。

turns.en: Good morning! Your dog is so cute.
Thanks! His name is Max. He's very friendly.
How old is he?

turns.cn: 两岁多了，特别喜欢玩接球。
turns.en: He's about two years old. He loves playing fetch.

turns.cn: 这个公园真不错，空气很好。
turns.en: This park is really nice. The air is so fresh.

turns.cn: 是啊，我每天早上都来散步。
turns.en: Yeah, I come here for a walk every morning.
Well, see you around!

turns.cn: 再见，祝你有美好的一天！
turns.en: Bye! Have a great day!

title: Picnic in the Park
scene: 你和朋友在公园野餐，分享食物。

turns.en: The weather is perfect today!
It really is. Perfect for a picnic.
Would you like a sandwich?

turns.cn: 好的，谢谢！你带了什么喝的？
turns.en: Sure, thanks! What did you bring to drink?
Lemonade and iced water.
I'll have some lemonade, please.

turns.cn: 那边有人在放风筝，我们去看看吧？
turns.en: Some people are flying kites over there. Want to go check it out?
Sounds good. Let's go after we eat!

title: Lost Child
scene: 你在公园看到一位家长着急地找人。

turns.cn: 请问您有没有看到一个穿红衣服的小男孩？
turns.en: Excuse me, have you seen a little boy in a red shirt?
How old is he? What does he look like?

turns.cn: 五岁，黑色短发，穿着蓝色短裤。
turns.en: He's five, with short black hair and blue shorts.

turns.cn: 我刚才在游乐场那边看到类似的孩子。
turns.en: I think I saw a boy like that near the playground.

turns.cn: 太感谢了！我这就过去看看。
turns.en: Thank you so much! I'll head over there right now.
Would you like me to help you look?
No, that's okay. I really appreciate it!
